name: EUR/USD

setup.waiting: Downtrend intact (4H + Daily) — waiting for a pullback to the 8-EMA to go short.

patterns.name: Shooting star / bearish pin
patterns.note: At a level with confluence — worth a plan. Wait for the candle to CLOSE, then size it with the trade plan.

patterns.name: Inside bar
patterns.note: Missing full confluence — it needs a level AND the trend or RSI to agree. Wait for confirmation.

confidence_why: 4H and Daily agree, momentum with the trend, price is at a level
analysis: EUR/USD is leaning down on the 4-hour, 83% conviction. The Daily bias agrees. Volatility is quiet — coiled and choppy. Nearest structure: floor (12.0 pips away). A firm dollar (+0.11% DXY) is a tailwind for the read.
watch: Downtrend intact (4H + Daily) — waiting for a pullback to the 8-EMA to go short.

chartist.read: 4H bearish (8/21/55 stack), price under the 8-EMA; choppy. RSI 41.4. Daily bias agrees. Nearest level 1.14 (12.0 pips). Trigger in play.

quant.read: Volatility dead/coiling (4H ATR ~15 pips). No edge in a low-vol mid-range — size would be minimum.

risk.read: Gate CLOSED. Nothing fits the 1% rule right now — the veto holds, capital protected.

trade.read: On standby until a level and a clean trigger appear together.
